name: llm-vault
description: OpenClaw plugin scaffold for explicit llm-vault status, search, and fetch access.

repoRoot.description: Path to the llm-vault checkout. Defaults to the repo root that contains this plugin; relative paths resolve from that default root.

vaultAgentPath.description: Path to vault-agent. Relative paths resolve from repoRoot and default to ./vault-agent.

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout enforced by the plugin wrapper around vault-agent execution.
